scope: target-revision 4x8 inherited DRAM-field decoupler artwork and population
promotion_rule: the factory assembly drawing establishes C38/C42/C46/C50 refdes, placement, and original population; registered component and solder panoramas prove that all 32 common-artwork landing pairs remain fabricated, including the older C63 grid landing even though the separate .009 C63 callout between D41/D40 is bare; the complete target view establishes assembly DNP for the other 28 grid footprints; no source establishes capacitance value beyond the schematic model

factory_drawing.coordinate_precision: reviewed approximate label centres and enclosing boxes; refdes/row identity evidence, not a photogrammetric board-coordinate fit
factory_drawing.observation: the .009 assembly drawing labels four horizontal capacitor bodies above the populated D91-D84 DRAM row; the labels align with every other package, C38 over D91, C42 over D89, C46 over D87, and C50 over D85

legacy_grid_mapping.observation: the older .006 assembly drawing maps a complete 4x8 DRAM-field zigzag; this source is used only to identify the optional bare footprint refdes inherited by the common 7.102.158 artwork, never to promote target-revision population

owner_board.coordinate_precision: reviewed approximate enclosing boxes; removal/population evidence, not electrical endpoint coordinates
owner_board.observation: the populated D91-D84 bank fixes the same four sites; each site has a coherent horizontal landing pair with solder and clipped lead remnants but no capacitor body, consistent with post-factory precious-metal removal rather than a factory DNP
owner_board.optional_grid_observation: D60-D83 are bare expansion footprints and the other DRAM-field capacitor sites have clean tinned landings without fitted bodies or clipped component leads; the four populated-row remnant sites remain visually distinct

sites.population_state: body removed; landing pair and clipped lead remnants retained
body removed; landing pair and clipped lead remnants retained
body removed; landing pair and clipped lead remnants retained
body removed; landing pair and clipped lead remnants retained

artwork_grid_photo_fit.coordinate_system: component-side board orientation after the guarded solder-panorama rectification; pixels remain observations and are locally fit to board millimetres
artwork_grid_photo_fit.observation: four rows of eight distinct horizontal two-hole landing pairs are exposed above the four DRAM rows. The older C63 position is the sixth pair of row two; the C69 position is the eighth pair of row four, not the 3.9 mm left-shifted routing workaround. The solder view shows C69.2 and the nearby R52.1 as distinct non-touching drilled annuli, so their local 0.8 mm drills use guarded 1.1 mm copper rather than moving C69

C63.disposition: inherited common-artwork landing retained and assembly DNP; distinct from the bare .009 callout between D41/D40

C69.disposition: eighth-column physical landing; retire the 194.5 mm DRC workaround

target_optional_grid_dnp.population_state: assembly DNP; retain the fabricated two-pad footprint
target_optional_grid_dnp.basis: the complete .009 target assembly view labels only C38/C42/C46/C50 in the DRAM field, while registered target component and solder panoramas show the other 28 inherited grid sites as clean bare tinned landing pairs
target_optional_grid_dnp.boundary: population is closed; capacitance, tolerance, and voltage remain unresolved for the four factory-fitted positions

non_field_placement_hold.disposition: retain schematic rail-bypass intent but do not fabricate a PCB footprint until target placement and population evidence is registered
non_field_placement_hold.retired_coordinate_origin: the former source-PCB coordinates came from an early fit-to-space pass, not from the .009 factory drawing, the .006 assembly drawing, or a registered owner-board observation
non_field_placement_hold.boundary: placement, target-revision population, package style, and capacitance remain unresolved; absence from the current PCB is an evidence hold and must not be promoted to assembly DNP

population_disposition: populate all four in the exact factory-assembly replica; the surviving owner board records later removal, not the original build state
